nasb.text: But I will leave among you A humble and lowly people, And they will take refuge in the name of the Lord.

esv.text: But I will leave in your midst a people humble and lowly. They shall seek refuge in the name of the Lord,

cnv.text: 但我要在你中間 留下謙虛卑微的人； 他們必投靠耶和華的名。

ccb.text: 我必把谦卑贫苦的人留在你那里， 他们必投靠在我耶和华的名下。
